Package Character

package Character
  • Class
    Description
    BasePlayer
    this class is the baseClass for PlayerType like Gymbro , Nerd , NormalGuy , Otaku that have same method to use with.
    BasePlayerProductionTest
    Test Class for checking basePlayer
    CharacterType
    ENUM for characterType
    CharacterTypeTest
    Test Class for checking CharacterType
    GymBro
    Gymbro class extends from BasePlayer Gymbro that have special interact with gym building
    GymBroTest
    Test Class for checking Gymbro method
    Nerd
    Nerd class extends from BasePlayer Nerd that have special interact with Chula building
    NerdTest
    Test Class for checking Nerd method
    NormalGuy
    NormalGuy class extends from BasePlayer NormalGuy that have noting special but the stat is balance
    NormalGuyTest
    Test Class for checking NormalGuy method
    Otaku
    Otaku class extends from BasePlayer Otaku that have special interact with Mall building
    OtakuTest
    Test Class for checking Otaku method
    PlayerCreate
    this class use to initialize player to connect with gamePane in package logic to create character
    PlayerCreateTest
    Test Class for checking PlayerCreate method
